dct_title_s: Gallia oder Franckrnch / die Landtafel des dritten bůchs
dct_description_sm: North oriented toward bottom of sheet.
Decorative banner and cartouche, coats of arms.
Pictorial vignettes of sea creatures (including Poseidon), ship.
